{{CargoRelic
|name=Mystery Egg
|class_id=20870
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=A mysterious egg with intricate shell patterns, but its contents remain unknown - maybe yolk. Will it hatch a treasure... or just an empty shell?
|fame=19
|art=11
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=27
|ss1=Snail DEF +10<br>Per 5 Dragon Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Dragon Gene LVLs Researched: 100/100
|ss2=Snail DEF +20<br>Per 5 Dragon Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Dragon Gene LVLs Researched: 100/100
|ss3=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 5 Dragon Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Dragon Gene LVLs Researched: 100/100
|ss4=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 5 Dragon Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Dragon Gene LVLs Researched: 100/100
|ss7=Snail DEF +30<br>Per 5 Dragon Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Dragon Gene LVLs Researched: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
